articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?

season.name: 2026 World Cup Qualifying - Concacaf, Second Round

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Terence Vancooten (Guyana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Panama. José Fajardo replaces Cecilio Waterman because of an injury.
José Córdoba (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Panama 0, Guyana 0.
Second Half begins Panama 0, Guyana 0.
Substitution, Panama. Cristian Martínez replaces Roderick Miller.
Substitution, Panama. José Luis Rodríguez replaces Ismael Díaz.
Goal!  Panama 1, Guyana 0. Cristian Martínez (Panama) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Adalberto Carrasquilla.
Goal!  Panama 2, Guyana 0. José Luis Rodríguez (Panama) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Yoel Bárcenas.
Nathan Moriah-Welsh (Guyana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Guyana. Deon Moore replaces Terence Vancooten.
Aníbal Godoy (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Guyana. Kelsey Benjamin replaces Nathan Ferguson.
Substitution, Guyana. Kadell Daniel replaces Elliott Bonds.
Substitution, Panama. César Blackman replaces Éric Davis.
Substitution, Panama. Jovani Welch replaces Aníbal Godoy.
Liam Gordon (Guyana) is shown the yellow card.
José Luis Rodríguez (Panama) is shown the yellow card.
Deon Moore (Guyana) is shown the yellow card.
Second Half ends, Panama 2, Guyana 0.
